title: Senior Doctor - Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services:
Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Neuland Laboratories Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
